title: Grevenmacher, Grevenmacher Canton — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Grevenmacher, Grevenmacher Canton: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Grevenmacher is a city in Grevenmacher Canton with a population of 5,000. A charming wine town on the Moselle River in eastern Luxembourg, known for its vineyards, wineries, and the annual Grape and Wine Festival.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
